{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317303863FD2DB44B34077B9529"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7553629792308609854","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有男主吗[思考]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758721050,"group_id":"7529434395841661977","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1BcllRH4kDTWjJxOdPFOaM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7d88ced9e1b84c8a9455a81916e56020~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793495&x-signature=1V3QnHXXo7Ol9D0ES75g0A7RXlU%3D","user_id":"149130308494251","user_name":"嘻嘻哈哈每一天哟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"149130308494251","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1666937826,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7529434395841661977","book_info":{"abstract":"技术流种田 & 空间基建（硬核发展向）
农业博士秦筝一睁眼，旱魃千里，饿殍载道。随身空间里没有神丹妙药，只有她实验田的全套现代农具、高产种子库和半柜子农业文献。
逃荒？不，这是大型实景农业改造项目启动现场！
别人挖草根，她测绘土壤；别人抢浑水，她打井找暗河。空间里的手摇播种机、简易脱粒机一亮相，惊呆逃荒队友。没有牛？人力齿轮组安排上！缺肥料？沤粪堆肥搞起来！
当流民还在挣扎求生，秦筝已用专业知识结合空间工具，在逃荒路上开辟出移动试验田，土豆红薯悄然萌芽。抵达北方荒原，面对冻土盐碱地，她空间里的土壤改良剂和耐寒种子成了终极武器。
知识就是第一生产力，空间是移动的农业基地！ 看硬核农学女博士如何用科学种田碾压天灾，从一粒种子开始，在蛮荒之地建起属于农耕文明的钢铁堡垒！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2od8a5f658e8f362c1d0153fef32596a63~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"萌小呆啊","author_id":"","book_id":"7529434395841661977","book_name":"钢铁堡垒：从逃荒农女到基建领主","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e0b8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":247,"name":"医术","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=247&name=医术&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":557,"name":"逃荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=557&name=逃荒&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7529533305213944382","read_count":"186","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1384310"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"395","tags":"种田,古代言情,逃荒,医术,基建,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2od8a5f658e8f362c1d0153fef32596a63~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779442239&x-signature=AkQjlhcULQerm9mO1TXk5XpFL7o%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3843533567429224","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"12"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317303863FD2DB44B34077B9529"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":
